templates.name: OpenAI Chat Completions
templates.description: Standard OpenAI GPT chat completions API. Supports all GPT models including GPT-4o.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: OpenAI Chat (Streaming)
templates.description: OpenAI GPT with SSE streaming enabled. Same models, real-time token-by-token output.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: OpenAI Vision
templates.description: OpenAI GPT-4o with image/vision support. Automatically includes clipboard image if available.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: Anthropic Claude Messages
templates.description: Anthropic Claude Messages API. Supports Claude 4.5 Sonnet, Claude 3.5 Haiku, and other Claude models.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: Anthropic Claude Vision
templates.description: Anthropic Claude with image/vision support. Automatically includes clipboard image if available.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: Google Gemini (Native API)
templates.description: Google Gemini via native generateContent API. Uses API key authentication. Supports Gemini 2.0 Flash, 2.5 Pro, and more.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: DeepSeek Chat
templates.description: DeepSeek API with OpenAI-compatible format. Supports DeepSeek-V3 (deepseek-chat) and DeepSeek-R1 (deepseek-reasoner).
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: Groq Chat
templates.description: Groq ultra-fast inference API. Supports Llama 3.3, Mixtral, Gemma, and other open-source models.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: xAI Grok Chat
templates.description: xAI Grok API. Supports Grok-3, Grok-3-mini, and Grok-2 models.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: OpenRouter (200+ Models)
templates.description: OpenRouter meta-provider with access to 200+ models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, and more via a single API key.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: Alibaba Qwen Chat
templates.description: Alibaba Cloud Qwen models via DashScope API. Supports Qwen-Max, Qwen-Plus, and Qwen-Turbo.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: Zhipu GLM Chat
templates.description: Zhipu AI GLM-4 models. Supports GLM-4-Plus, GLM-4-Air, and GLM-4-Flash.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI

templates.name: OpenAI Whisper STT
templates.description: Speech-to-text transcription via OpenAI Whisper API. Uses multipart/form-data to upload audio.
templates.author: PasteSuiteAI
